name: item
description: A composable list/menu row with the full shadcn compound vocabulary: the core item exposes leading (media) / content / trailing (actions) slots and variant (default | outline | muted) + size (default | sm); the typed child partials mirror shadcn's ItemTitle / ItemDescription / ItemHeader / ItemFooter / ItemGroup (role=list) / ItemSeparator / ItemMedia (default | icon | image), each its own data-slot. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the item partial (+ its item/title, item/description, item/header, item/footer, item/group, item/separator and item/media children) to your JTE root at lievit/item.jte, reached as @template.lievit.item(content=@`...`). Compose the content column from item.title + item.description (typed sub-parts, not free markup), span the row with item.header / item.footer, wrap a list of rows in item.group (role=list, give each item role="listitem") and divide them with item.separator. Put a leading icon/image tile via item.media (variant icon | image). The source is yours: edit freely.
